question.text: Under Regulation 9(4)(iv) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015, designated persons must include the CEO and employees up to how many levels below the CEO?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Regulation 9(4)(iv) states that designated persons shall include the CEO and employees up to two levels below the CEO, irrespective of their functional role or ability to access UPSI. **The Trap:** One might assume only those with actual UPSI access need to be designated, but CEO minus two levels is mandatory regardless. **Cross-Exam Context:** This applies equally to listed companies, intermediaries, fiduciaries, and material subsidiaries. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This is an 'irrespective' criterion - even if an employee at CEO-2 level has no UPSI access, they must be designated.
